name: hound-mcp
summary: Web research for AI agents. Fetch any page with anti-bot bypass plus web search. $0 forever. No scrapling dependency: hound uses primp + patchright directly. Graceful degradation when browser deps are unavailable (HTTP-only mode on Termux/Android). Token-optimized tool definitions, polished cross-platform CLI, brick-proof self-update with hound doctor + rollback.
